offer: Contract management tool that simplifies document generation and compliance tracking.
problem: Small law firms struggle with managing contracts efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal professionals
Share insights on Indie Hackers about legal workflows
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for legal tech discussions
try_it: Allow users to test manual invoice entry and vendor management.
pay: Flexible pricing with clear upgrade options.
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early access for first 10 sign-ups
Share weekly updates in legal communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Create templates for common contract types
Set default reminders for contract renewals
Enable CSV import for existing contracts
Streamline the onboarding process for new users
